name: Ginger Whipped Cream
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup finely chopped candied ginger root
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl fitted with an electric mixer, beat the heavy cream until it forms stiff peaks.
2. Gradually add the sugar and ground ginger while continuing to beat the mixture until it holds stiff peaks.
3. Gently fold in the finely chopped candied ginger root.
4. Transfer the whipped cream to a serving bowl.
5. Garnish with additional candied ginger, if desired.
